text.content:
✸ Protean

Level 1: Eyes of the Beast

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Passive

Your eyes glow red, granting perfect vision in total darkness — no light source required. You can see in pitch-black conditions as clearly as daylight. The red glow is visible to others and cannot be suppressed. Also grants limited infrared vision — living beings glow faintly with body heat. Does not penetrate supernatural darkness (Stygian Shroud). Can be activated and deactivated reflexively.

Level 1: Weight of the Feather

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Reduce your effective weight to almost nothing. You leave no footprints, don't trigger pressure plates, and can walk on surfaces that wouldn't support normal weight (thin ice, a pile of leaves, fresh snow). You can also reduce fall damage to 0 for falls up to 30 meters. You still have normal mass for combat purposes — you can be pushed, grappled, and hit normally. Lasts one scene.

Level 2: Feral Weapons

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: -- | Type: Combat

Grow razor-sharp claws from your fingertips. The claws deal Aggravated damage (Str + 2) to all targets, including vampires. They can rend metal, shred body armor, and tear through car doors. The transformation takes one turn and is painful but brief. Claws can be retracted at will. While extended, fine manipulation (typing, lock-picking) suffers a 3-dice penalty. The claws are obviously inhuman — a clear Masquerade breach if witnessed.

Level 3: Earth Meld

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Sink into bare earth, soil, or natural stone (not concrete, tile, or pavement). You are completely protected from sunlight, fire, and physical attacks while submerged. You remain aware of activity directly above you (vibrations, sounds). You can emerge at any time as a free action. If the earth above you is disturbed (excavation), you are forced out and must act immediately. Cannot be used in buildings. Staking yourself before melding provides a secure daytime resting place.

Level 3: Shapechange

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Sta + Protean | Type: Utility

Transform into an animal — typically a wolf, large dog, owl, or bat (choose one form when you first learn this power; you can learn additional forms later). You gain the animal's physical capabilities (flight for a bat, keen senses for a wolf) while retaining your mental Attributes and Disciplines (except those requiring speech or hands). Your clothing and small personal items merge into the form. You can speak telepathically to people who have tasted your blood. Transformation takes 1 turn. Lasts until you choose to revert.

Level 3: Fleshcrafting

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Dex + Protean (Dex + Medicine for complex work) | Type: Utility

Amalgam: Dominate 2

Reshape flesh and bone with your hands — your own or another's. Can alter facial features (perfect disguise), repair cosmetic damage, add or remove bulk, and sculpt bodies into new configurations. Changes are permanent unless reversed. Working on yourself takes 1 turn for minor changes, 10 minutes for major alterations. Working on others requires them to be restrained or willing. Can be used to inflict horrific disfigurement: 2 Aggravated damage and permanent appearance changes. Historically a Tzimisce art.

Level 4: Metamorphosis

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Sta + Protean | Type: Combat

Take on monstrous hybrid forms — a wolf-man, a giant bat creature, or a chitinous insectoid horror. In war-form, gain: +3 to Strength, +2 to Stamina, claws dealing Aggravated damage (Str + 3), and armor equivalent to 2 points of damage reduction. Your appearance is terrifying — mortals must check for panic, and even vampires feel their Beast stir. The transformation takes 1 turn. You cannot speak normally but can growl and snarl. Lasts one scene.

Level 4: Horrid Form

Cost: 1 Rouse | Pool: Sta + Protean | Type: Combat

Amalgam: Dominate 2

Transform into a monstrous Zulo shape — a 2.5-meter-tall nightmare of stretched skin, elongated limbs, and exposed muscle. Gain: +4 Strength, +2 Stamina, +1 Dexterity, claws (Str + 3, Aggravated), and a terror aura (mortals flee, vampires must check for Rotschreck at Difficulty 3). You cannot use Social Attributes for anything except Intimidation. The form is unmistakably inhuman. Lasts one scene.

Level 5: Mist Form

Cost: 2 Rouse | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Dissolve your entire body into an intangible cloud of cold mist. In this form, you are immune to all physical damage, sunlight, and fire. You can seep through cracks, keyholes, and ventilation systems. You cannot interact with the physical world, use Disciplines (except Auspex), or speak. Strong winds can disperse you (treat as 2 Aggravated damage). Holy objects block your passage. Reforming takes 1 turn. You can maintain Mist Form indefinitely but each scene requires a Rouse check.

Level 5: The Unfettered Heart

Cost: Free | Pool: -- | Type: Utility

Passive. You can shift the location of your heart within your body at will, making staking almost impossible. Any staking attempt suffers a +3 Difficulty penalty. Even if someone knows about this power, they cannot predict where your heart currently is — it moves freely within your torso. Additionally, if you are staked, you can spend 1 Willpower to force the stake out over 3 turns of concentration.
